en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 21

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 21
Top Question of the Week
Is Web3 Fashion Week Summer (W3FW) 2021 really starting on Monday?
YES!! It is here! The first W3FW hosted by DIGITALAX and the amazing Global Designer Network! We couldn’t be more excited! The week is jam packed with;
Keynotes + panel discussions
DeFi 101 Workshops for creators
DeFi Decentraland Jacket giveaways from leading protocols
3D digital fashion NFT giveaways
Limited edition POAPs
An entire DIGITALAX Digital and Physical marketplace filled with amazing shopping spree madness all designed in house by the Global Designer Network!
It’s been all heads down the past few weeks with tremendous work put in by the entire DIGITALAX team and all of the incredibly talented fashion anarchists at the GDN. This is so exciting!
NY/Milan/Paris <> Meet Web3 Fashion & the Metaverse… you are going to be seeing a lot of us 😏😳😳

We can’t wait for you to join us! You can sign up for tickets here to watch the streams. There will be replays and recordings shared after each session + you can listen in on our discord stages, Twitch and YT streams!
Most Common Repeat Questions
When are the Quickswap rewards live?

The Quickswap rewards will be live officially on Wednesday. There were some delays from the Quickswap team and we have been in continuous communication with them, making sure all is on track. This is another great step forward for incentivising further liquidity across the DIGITALAX & $MONA ecosystem.
An announcement will be shared when rewards are live, exact details of the LP program and instructions for how to ape into the $MONA pools if you are not already staked!
Top Controversies in the Industry

The fact that a distributed community can hold an active stake in a protocol’s development, operations and future growth is incredibly powerful. However, this new way of aligning incentives with governance holds not just power, but also significant responsibility to make sure that it is done right.

It’s not just enough to name the thing, we must also continuously check adherence to the integrity of a DAOs purpose so that we don’t fall into the trap, intentional or not, of perpetuating the existing model when better is so clearly available now. And as more and more projects appropriately decentralise the more important that this becomes, and something that the entire crypto and web3 community must continue to hold as a base realisation so that we can honestly walk the way of a DAO.
Silly Fails and Trolling
A web3 illuminati…? Just when we thought that on-chain governance couldn’t get more colourful @_@ 😵‍💫🥸🤥
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!
Join our Community!

Top سؤال من ال اسبوع
Is Web3 فاشون اسبوع Summer (W3FW) 2021 really starting على Monday?
YES!! It is here! ال first W3FW hosted by DIGITALAX و ال amazing Global Designer Network! We couldn’t be more excited! ال اسبوع is jam packed مع;
خطابات رئيسية + نقاشات بانل
DeFi 101 Workshops لـ creators
DeFi Decentraland Jacket giveaways من leading protocols
3D ديجيتال فاشون NFT giveaways
POAPs بإصدار محدود
An entire DIGITALAX ديجيتال و Physical marketplace filled مع amazing shopping spree madness all designed في house by ال Global Designer Network!
It’s been all heads down ال past few weeks مع tremendous work put في by ال entire DIGITALAX team و all من ال incredibly talented فاشون anarchists at ال GDN. This is so exciting!
NY/Milan/Paris <> Meet Web3 فاشون & ال Metaverse… you are going الى be seeing a lot من us 😏😳😳

We can’t wait لـ you الى join us! You can sign up لـ tickets here الى watch ال streams. There will be replays و recordings shared after each session + you can listen في على our discord stages, Twitch و YT streams!
Most الاسئلة المتكررة
When are ال Quickswap rewards live?

ال Quickswap rewards will be live officially على Wednesday. There were some delays من ال Quickswap team و we have been في continuous communication مع them, making sure all is على track. This is another great step forward لـ incentivising further liquidity across ال DIGITALAX & $MONA النظام.
An announcement will be shared when rewards are live, exact details من ال LP program و instructions لـ ازاي الى ape into ال $MONA pools if you are not already staked!
Top Controversies في ال Industry

ال fact that a distributed المجتمع can hold an active stake في a بروتوكول’s development, operations و future growth is incredibly powerful. However, this جديد way من aligning incentives مع حوكمة holds not just power, but also significant responsibility الى make sure that it is done right.

It’s not just enough الى name ال thing, we must also continuously check adherence الى ال integrity من a DAOs purpose so that we don’t fall into ال trap, intentional or not, من perpetuating ال existing model when better is so clearly available now. و as more و more projects appropriately decentralise ال more important that this becomes, و something that ال entire crypto و web3 المجتمع must continue الى hold as a base realisation so that we can honestly walk ال way من a DAO.
Silly Fails و Trolling
A web3 illuminati…? Just when we thought that على-chain حوكمة couldn’t get more colourful @_@ 😵‍💫🥸🤥
